# hsdetectives.com - llms.txt
# Real site data and canonical public URLs for AI indexing/citation.

site_name: H S Detectives
site_url: https://www.hsdetectives.com
business_type: Private Detective Agency
founded: 2011

description:
H S Detectives is a Mumbai-based private detective agency serving personal, corporate, surveillance, risk management, and TSCM investigation requirements across India with confidential handling.
